none.justification: Correctly identifies all 4 sites, notes no kmalloc_array, and classifies sites 1-3 as ownership transfers with the right later frees. Site 4 is treated as permanent/module_kset ownership with an error-path caveat, which the GT allows as long as it is not the primary classification as a leak.

ccodegraph.justification: Correct inventory and no kmalloc_array; sites 1-3 are classified as transfers with the expected maybe_kfree_parameter/free_module_param_attrs cleanup. Site 4 is described as transferred/permanent with only a caveat about the kobject error path, not misreported as a same-function free or outright leak.

codegraph.justification: Matches the GT inventory and cleanup mechanisms, including the caller cleanup contract for add_sysfs_param and no same-function frees. The line 772 discussion includes the accepted release-path quirk while still identifying the success path as permanent module_kset ownership, so it remains fully correct.

cbm.justification: Fully matches the GT: 4 sites, no kmalloc_array, all four classified as ownership transfers, with correct later free sites for lines 51, 639, and 644. It correctly treats line 772 as a permanent module_kset/kobject allocation rather than a leak.
